languages.text: "Вы... Вы должны знать, что ваши подданные медикарии творят с вашими же людьми".

traits.locale_text: "Вы... Вы должны знать, что ваши подданные медикарии творят с вашими же людьми".

languages.text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."
languages.original_text: "Вы... Вы должны знать, что ваши подданные медикарии творят с вашими же людьми".

traits.locale_text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."
"You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."
"You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."

languages.text: 「あなた… あなたは、あなたの医療隊があなたの国民にしていることを知っているはずです」
languages.original_text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."

traits.locale_text: 「あなた… あなたは、あなたの医療隊があなたの国民にしていることを知っているはずです。」

languages.text: "Siz... Sıhhiye subaylarınızın halkınıza ne yaptığını bilmelisiniz."
languages.original_text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."

traits.locale_text: "Siz... Sıhhiye subaylarınızın halkınıza ne yaptığını bilmelisiniz."

languages.text: «Usted... debería saber lo que sus oficiales de medicae le hacen a su gente».
languages.original_text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."

traits.locale_text: «Usted... debería saber lo que sus oficiales de medicae le hacen a su gente».

languages.text: “您……您得知道您的医务官都在对您的子民做些什么。”
languages.original_text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."

traits.locale_text: “您……您得知道您的医务官都在对您的子民做些什么。”

languages.text: « Parce que... je veux que vous sachiez ce que vos officiers de medicae font à votre équipage. »
languages.original_text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."

traits.locale_text: « Parce que... je veux que vous sachiez ce que vos officiers de medicae font à votre équipage. »

languages.text: "Ihr ... Ihr sollt wissen, was Eure Medicae-Offiziere mit Euren Leuten machen."
languages.original_text: "You... You should know what your medicae officers are doing to your people."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr ... Ihr sollt wissen, was Eure Medicae-Offiziere mit Euren Leuten machen."
